meta.pageDescription: Professional accounting services in Malta. Dedicated accountants. Full financial visibility through your VACEI portal.

hero.sub: VACEI provides Malta businesses with professional accounting services — delivered by a dedicated team, managed through a structured client portal with real-time financial visibility.
hero.note: Create your account, access your portal, and request your tailored proposal in minutes.
hero.portalBannerSub: Here's your financial overview and what's happening with your accounts today.
hero.notif1Sub: April accounts reconciled and up to date
hero.notif2Title: VAT return prepared by James R.
hero.notif2Sub: Q1 VAT return ready for your review

why.sub: A dedicated team, real-time visibility, and a structured portal — built around your Malta business from day one.
why.stat1Label: From account creation to active team assigned
why.stat2Label: Malta VAT compliance — filed accurately, every time
why.stat3Label: Everything in one place — no emails, no PDFs
why.stat4Label: Live access to your financial position, always
why.a4Txt: VACEI accounting in Malta is delivered through A4 Services — an established accounting firm with local expertise, regulatory knowledge, and professional oversight built into every engagement.

categorisation.p: Your VACEI team uses AI to instantly identify merchants, match transactions to the right category, and flag anything unusual — so your books stay clean without manual effort.
categorisation.feat1: Merchants identified automatically from bank strings
categorisation.feat2: Transactions mapped to correct accounts and VAT codes
categorisation.feat3: Exceptions reviewed and corrected by your accountant
categorisation.feat4: Rules applied consistently — books always up to date

toggle.title: A simple way to understand accounting with VACEI
toggle.lead: VACEI combines a dedicated accounting team with a structured client portal — giving you full visibility over your financial position at all times.
toggle.teamP: A dedicated accounting team is assigned to your business from day one — bookkeeping, reconciliations, VAT, management accounts, and reporting — handled accurately and on time.
toggle.teamFeat1Desc: Every transaction recorded, reconciled, and maintained accurately — ongoing.
toggle.teamFeat2Desc: Accounts reconciled regularly so your figures stay accurate and current.
toggle.teamFeat3Desc: VAT returns prepared and submitted accurately, on time, every time.
toggle.teamFeat4Desc: Clear monthly insights that explain your financial performance.
toggle.portalP: Log in to your VACEI portal and see your full financial picture — what you're owed, what you owe, your bank balance, and your team's activity. No waiting.
toggle.portalFeat1Desc: Your real-time financial position, always updated.
toggle.portalFeat2Desc: Receivables, payables, and bank balance — all in one place.
toggle.portalFeat3Desc: See your VAT position and upcoming obligations clearly.
toggle.portalFeat4Desc: Message your accounting team directly from the portal.
toggle.eqSub: A managed accounting service, with real-time visibility over your business.
toggle.eqQuote: "They handle everything, and I can see everything."

services.lead: VACEI combines a dedicated accounting team with a structured client portal — giving you complete visibility over your financial position. No chasing. No delays.
services.c1Desc: Every transaction recorded, reconciled, and maintained accurately — ongoing, without you lifting a finger.
services.c2Desc: Clear monthly and quarterly reports that explain your financial performance in plain language.
services.c3Desc: VAT returns, tax submissions, and Malta compliance requirements — handled accurately and on time.
services.c4Desc: Access receivables, payables, balances, and trends — all in one place, anytime.
services.c5Desc: Accounts reconciled regularly so your figures stay accurate and your books stay clean.
services.c6Desc: A team assigned to your Malta business — familiar with your numbers and always available when needed.

howSteps.title: Three steps to better accounting
howSteps.lead: No lengthy onboarding. No complex forms. Up and running in minutes.
howSteps.s1Desc: Access your VACEI portal instantly. Your secure engagement dashboard is live from the moment you sign up.
howSteps.s2Desc: Tell us about your business and what you need — receive a tailored proposal directly in your portal.
howSteps.s3Desc: Your accounting team is assigned and your setup begins. We handle everything from day one.

tracker.title: Everything you need to know — always available
tracker.lead: No more waiting for reports. Log in and see your full financial position, team activity, and upcoming obligations in real time.
tracker.note: Clear. Structured. Always up to date.

pricing.title: Transparent accounting pricing
pricing.lead: Start with what you need and scale as your business grows. All packages include VACEI portal access.
pricing.p1Desc: For small companies needing clean postings and basic support.
pricing.p2Desc: For active businesses needing bookkeeping, VAT support, reconciliations, deadline tracking, and accountant review.
pricing.p3Desc: For growing companies needing accounting, payroll, management reporting, advisory, cash-flow support, and priority assistance.
pricing.foot: All prices exclude VAT. All packages include VACEI portal access. Final pricing depends on transaction volume, number of entities, VAT complexity, and reporting requirements.

supported.p1: For our Malta clients, all accounting operations are delivered in partnership with A4 Services — a highly established accounting and corporate services firm in Malta.
supported.p2: You get the world-class technology and immediate visibility of the VACEI platform, backed by the deep local expertise and compliance rigor of A4 Services.

testimonial.quote: VACEI completely changed how we handle our finances. Having a portal where we can see our live position and know our accounting team is handling everything behind the scenes is incredible.
testimonial.author: Director — Technology Agency, Malta

cta.p: Join businesses relying on VACEI to maintain accurate books, stay compliant, and keep their financial position clear.
cta.note: No commitment required for initial portal access.

intro.p: Every part of your business finances — visible, structured, and managed by your dedicated VACEI team through one portal.
